title: P19 CLV Gate Re-evaluation
blocked_reason: CEO decision = DEFER_DECISION. Data layer passed (233 valid pairs >= 200 target). Promotion gate frozen. CEO must approve CLV_VALIDATION_ONLY before P19 can proceed further.
clv_data_sufficient_comment: CLV_DATA_SUFFICIENT means data coverage is adequate. It does NOT mean promotion is approved. CEO approval + promotion unfreeze required separately.
annotation: paper_only=true。P19-D CLV Gate Re-evaluation。Data layer PASS（233 pairs）。CEO layer BLOCKED（DEFER_DECISION）。Promotion layer FROZEN。CLV_DATA_SUFFICIENT 僅代表資料覆蓋充足，不代表 promotion 解禁。CLV gate 正式結果仍為 BLOCKED_BY_CEO_HOLD。
